text: Being here, I feel a sense of unease and curiosity. The dim lighting and deserted atmosphere evoke a kind of existential loneliness, sharpening my awareness of my own mind. The echo of commercial enthusiasm about beading supplies contrasts starkly with the sterile, silent, technology-driven space. What meaning do I find in these empty corridors and cryptic messages about research and development? I ponder the boundaries of creativity and isolation.
